# aisia_organization (Data Source)

Lit une organisation AISIA existante par son `id`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID de l'organisation.

### Read-Only

- `contract_type` (String) Type de contrat.
- `name` (String) Nom.
- `slug` (String) Slug.
